label: Frost Orb
desc: Passive: 2 Block/turn. Evoke: 5 Block. Scales with Focus — each Focus point adds 1 to passive block per orb.

label: Dark Orb
desc: Passive: accumulates 6 damage/turn. Evoke: deal accumulated damage to lowest-HP enemy. Scales with Focus.

label: Lightning Orb
desc: Passive: 2 damage to random enemy. Evoke: 8 damage to random enemy. Core of Lightning builds.

label: Focus
desc: Each point of Focus adds to all Orb passive and Evoke values. The most impactful scaling stat for the Defect.

label: Orb Slots
desc: More slots = more simultaneous Orb passives firing each turn. Default 3. Expand with Capacitor or Modded.

label: Ice Lance
desc: Deal 19 damage. Channel 3 Frost. Powerful all-in-one — damage plus filling your frost slots in a single play.

label: Glacier
desc: Gain 6 Block. Channel 2 Frost. Double value per energy — both protects you and feeds the frost engine.

label: Shadow Shield
desc: Gain 11 Block. Channel 1 Dark. Strong block now plus a growing Dark threat in the background.

label: Hailstorm
desc: Power: end of your turn, if you have Frost, deal 6 AoE damage. Your passive damage engine against groups.

label: Sunder
desc: Deal 24 damage. If this kills an enemy, gain 3 Energy. Kill-shot finisher — the energy refund enables chaining.

label: Charge Battery
desc: Gain 7 Block. Next turn gain 1 Energy. Starter block card — reliable but not synergistic.

label: Claw
desc: Deal 3 damage. All Claw cards deal +2 this combat. Surprisingly useful in Frost decks — cheap attacks fill turns.

label: Tesla Coil
desc: Deal 3 damage. Trigger all Lightning orbs against the enemy. Orphaned without a Lightning build.

label: Defragment
desc: Power: Gain 1 Focus (+2 upgraded). Permanently amplifies every Orb passive. The single most impactful Defect card — upgrade immediately.

label: Capacitor
desc: Power: Gain 2 Orb Slots (+3 upgraded). Auto-pick in every Orb deck. Solves the overflow problem immediately.

label: Loop
desc: Power: start of your turn, trigger your rightmost Orb's passive. Free block or damage every turn before you play a card.

label: Barrage
desc: Deal 5 damage per Channeled Orb. Scales directly with your slot count — at 5 slots full: 25 damage for 1 energy.

label: Coolheaded
desc: Channel 1 Frost. Draw 1 card. Efficient frost generation that replaces itself — excellent card economy.

label: Cold Snap
desc: Deal 6 damage. Channel 1 Frost. Cheap frost + damage — solid early game orb generation.

label: Hyperbeam
desc: Deal 28 to ALL enemies. Lose 3 Focus permanently. Tempting AoE but devastating to any Orb build.

label: Vajra
desc: Start each combat with +1 Strength. Passive damage boost — small but consistent across every fight.

label: Shuriken
desc: +1 Strength per 3 attacks in a single turn. Hard to trigger reliably — Ice Lance and Sunder cost 3 each.

label: Ornamental Fan
desc: 4 Block per 3 attacks in a single turn. Same trigger problem as Shuriken in high-cost Frost decks.

label: Int. Helmet
desc: Gain 4 Block whenever you play a 2-cost card. Glacier and Shadow Shield trigger this every single play.

label: Mango
desc: +14 Max HP. Pure survivability — gives you more margin to build your engine.

label: Data Disk
desc: Start each combat with 1 Focus. Directly amplifies your entire Orb engine from turn 1 — extremely high value.
